Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Return to Community care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
604 V0200B2_CAT_DT V0200B2_CAT_DT V0200B2 Care Area Assessment Completion Date CHAR 8 The data in this column contains the Care Area Assessment (CAA) process completion date.
